text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! How did you get so many?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer! I'll treasure them all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! They'll look great on my desk! Now I'll be
able to study together with them every day! ♪
